name: libtest-requires-perl
title: libtest-requires-perl
summary: utility module for tests to check whether modules are available
description:
utility module for tests to check whether modules are available
Test::Requires is a Perl module for tests written using Test::Builder that
simply checks to see if the module can be loaded. If loading the module fails
then this skips all tests in the file, rather than causing a complete failure
in module testing.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtest-requires-perl because utility module for tests to check whether modules are available.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtest-requires-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtest-requires-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtest-requires-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
